claims.summary: Telemetry state-lock wait and hold time should be visible independently.
claims.disposition: Verified TelemetryIntegrationHealthV1 records bounded prewrite, write-lock-wait, and write-lock-hold timing.

claims.summary: Database and trace logging should not remain inside the shared BridgeState write lock.
claims.disposition: Verified current source releases the write lock before SQLite and trace-lab persistence.

claims.summary: Ping, reconnect, and backoff behavior should remain regression-covered.
claims.disposition: Verified existing WebSocket lifecycle and backoff tests cover connection and heartbeat handling.

claims.summary: Telemetry processing must retain bounded payload and integration evidence without copying raw reports.
claims.disposition: Verified bounded parse hashes, integration metrics, and capture receipts remain metadata-only.

claims.summary: Decoding or artifact scanning should move to spawn_blocking if it measurably stalls intake.
claims.disposition: Routed to natural timing observation; no executor or pipeline change is justified without a threshold-crossing baseline.
